text.title: mr-graph-vs-diff-reviewer Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for mr-graph-vs-diff-reviewer as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Stacking both a graph-indexed reviewer AND a diff-only reviewer on every PR by default.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Doubles cost, doubles comment noise, halves human attention on the actual review. Use the graph-indexed bot only on demand (`/review`).
